steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the size of the Kohana Marsh NWR. Only one note contains a size measurement: 'It encompasses 61 acres.' The correct choice must include that figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — A protected natural area, the Kohana Marsh NWR encompasses 61 acres of land in Hawaii.: includes the relevant size detail, directly indicating the refuge's size. ✓
  • Choice B — The Kohana Marsh NWR is a protected natural area managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service, which limits human activities there.: focuses on management and activity restrictions — no size mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — The Kohana Marsh NWR is a natural area in Hawaii, home to the Hawaiian stilt.: mentions the species it protects, not the size. ✗
  • Choice D — Home to the Hawaiian stilt, Hawaii's Kohana Marsh NWR is managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service.: mentions the species and management agency — no size. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
